prompt:
Create a dark cyber-goth editorial poster featuring an adult Asian woman seated barefoot on the floor of a dim surveillance laboratory. She has long loose black wavy hair, pale cool-toned skin, fragile smoky makeup, glossy lips, and a dazed but dangerous sideways gaze. Dress her in a black gothic techwear mini dress with a black leather bodice, lace trim, chain straps and chain garters around the thighs, a lace choker, and large black feather angel wings. Pose: sitting low on the floor with one leg folded and one leg extended, torso angled toward camera, one hand gripping a bright white glowing cable/light tube near her lap and the other hand raised delicately around the same cable above her head. The luminous cable forms a sweeping vertical arc through the center of the composition and another glowing curve snakes across the floor, casting harsh white highlights and green reflections.

Environment: a cramped, shadowy monitoring room with a grimy wall covered in exactly 8 visible eye-related papers: pupil printouts, eye photos, old taped photos, and surveillance documents. Include tape marks, dark shelves, a lattice panel, scattered wires, a green spotlight lamp on the left, an open old laptop in the bottom left foreground, a black keyboard in the bottom right foreground, loose paper sheets with eye drawings near her feet, and a dark monitor with green static/glow at the bottom edge. Use teal-green accent lighting, deep blacks, low-key cinematic contrast, slight lens bloom, film grain, chromatic aberration, VHS scanline texture, and digital glitch artifacts.

Typography and graphic overlays: make it look like a fashion-meets-horror glitch poster with distressed white pixelated type. Add exactly 4 large text blocks: top left “ARC OF NOISE”, middle right “DARK HALO”, lower right “FEED ME STATIC”, and small top right quote “THE SIGNAL BENDS. I LISTEN.”. Add exactly 5 small surveillance HUD text clusters: left upper “FEED_004B// VISUAL UNKNOWN”, left middle “NOISE IS NOT RANDOM. IT’S PRAYER. //23%”, bottom left “EYES OPEN. TRUTH CORRUPTED. BEYOND THE NOISE.”, lower right “SIGNAL LOST RECONNECTING...” with barcode-like marks, and bottom right “SPRING / SUMMER 2024 COLLECTION .08”. Keep all text white or pale gray, broken and glitched, integrated into the image without covering the face.

Composition: vertical 2:3 poster, subject centered slightly right, glowing arc cutting from bottom center to top right, laptop foreground left and keyboard foreground right for depth. Photorealistic high-fashion dark fantasy styling, unsettling surveillance-dream atmosphere, black signal demon/fallen angel mood, no extra people, no watermark.
